title: hieracium rubellum subsp. guthnikianum
intro: Hieracium rubellum subsp. guthnikianum, also known as Guthnik's hawkweed, is a rare, herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium rubellum subsp. guthnikianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues. Hieracium rubellum subsp. guthnikianum is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with the fresh plant material being harvested and dried for use in herbal remedies.
